issues.claim: Voice consistent with chapter 7 declarative-revelatory register
issues.objection: 7.24 speaks in chapter 7's declarative-revelatory voice (per thesis): the senior who has taught technique through chapters 2-6 now reveals what they have actually understood. Voice does not slip into productivity-blog cadence; does not slip into mystical cadence. STRETCHED tagging is explicit where the verse's metaphysical reach exceeds the operational analog. Coheres with the typology-and-veiling sub-register active across 7.13-7.30. The STRETCHED tag is honest for this verse: Verse claims metaphysical concealment (avyaktaṁ vyaktim āpannaṁ mistaken). Engineering analog scoped narrowly: architecture diagrams are partial; the substrate carried by the senior is not directly diagrammable. Counter-example: stale tacit assumption is not the verse's paraṁ bhāvam.

notes: Voice in 7.24 is the senior-engineer-revealing voice the chapter has earned by this point. PASS.
